title: Resource values are not displayed on the top resource bar
actual_result: Resource icons are visible but their numeric values are missing.
expected_result: All resource values should be displayed correctly.

title: Loading screen shows Connection Lost
actual_result: Loading is interrupted by a Connection Lost error.
expected_result: Loading should complete successfully and enter the next screen.

title: Loading screen remains stuck and never enters the game
actual_result: The loading screen remains stuck at 0% and never enters the game.
expected_result: The loading process should complete and enter the game normally.

title: Hero model is not rendered on the Hero Detail screen
actual_result: Hero information is visible but the hero model is missing.
expected_result: The selected hero model should be rendered correctly.

title: Hero portraits are missing from the Hero List
actual_result: Some hero cards are displayed without character portraits.
expected_result: Every owned hero card should display its portrait correctly.

title: Terrain rendering artifact appears on the World Map
actual_result: A corrupted terrain texture appears on the map.
expected_result: World map terrain should render normally without graphical artifacts.

title: Reward popup opens but reward items are missing
actual_result: The reward dialog is displayed, but no reward items are shown.
expected_result: All awarded items should be displayed in the reward popup.

title: Recruit reward panel is empty after successful draw
actual_result: The draw finishes successfully but no hero reward is displayed.
expected_result: The obtained hero should be displayed in the reward popup.

title: Chapter mission progress is displayed incorrectly
actual_result: Mission progress shows completed objectives that have not actually been completed.
expected_result: Mission progress should accurately reflect the player's current progress.

title: March path is displayed but the marching unit is missing
actual_result: The march path is visible but the troop is not rendered.
expected_result: The troop should move visibly along the march path.

title: Incorrect hero is displayed on the Hero Skills screen
actual_result: The Hero Skills page displays a different hero than the one selected.
expected_result: The selected hero should remain displayed.

title: Keep upgrades without consuming resources
actual_result: The Keep is upgraded successfully, but no resources are deducted.
expected_result: The required resources should be deducted when the upgrade is completed.
